title: Action under Section 8(1)(b) against Shri Firdos Mukadum, Absconders

No. U - 11011/02/2012 – PITNDPS dated 10.09.2013 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Firdos Mukadum s/o Late Shri Hussain Bhai, resident of 210, 9th Street Micksville, New York – 118 01, USA, be detained and kept in custody in Mumbai Central Prison, Mumbai with a view to preventing him from engaging in illicit trafficking of narcotic drugs and psychotropic substances. 2. Whereas the Central Government has reason to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or is concealing himself so that the said detention order cannot be executed; 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by clause (b) of sub- section (1) of Section 8 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before Shri Rajendra Verma, Intelligence Officer, O/o Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi Zonal Unit, B-4, 6th Floor, Paryavaran Bhawan, CGO Complex, New Delhi – 110 003 within 10 days of the publication of this order in the Official Gazette. [F. No. U-11011/02/2012-PITNDPS] VINESH PACHNANDA,Under Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
